title: Logs to Chests
description: Craft logs directly into chests, skipping the plank step. Works with Vanilla and modded logs tagged as ‘log’ for faster storage crafting.
body: **Logs to Chests** is a Minecraft datapack that allows you to craft logs directly into Vanilla Minecraft chests, bypassing the usual step of turning logs into planks. It uses the Minecraft log tag, making it compatible with both Vanilla and modded logs. Regardless of the source of the logs, the recipe always produces standard Minecraft chests, ensuring consistency across your storage solutions. This makes creating storage faster and more efficient while maintaining full compatibility with other mods and gameplay mechanics. Simply place your logs in the crafting grid, and you’ll get chests immediately, streamlining your storage setup.
